OmniScript.description: Story - 298 [ Facility Rate Creation - Type of Rate = Shift] Story - 607 [ Facility Rate Creation - Type of Rate = Target]
OmniScript.name: ServiceAccFacilityRateCreation

omniProcessElements.name: IP_FetchAndCreateShiftRatesRecords
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "IP_FetchAndCreateShiftRatesRecords", "integrationProcedureKey" : "FacilityRate_CreatePreventiveCareAgreementRecords", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "ContextId" : "%ContextId%", "Rate" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:Rate%", "UnitOfMeasure" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:UnitOfMeasure%", "ListOfFacilityTitleIds" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:CustomOmniMultiSelectLWC%", "typeOfRate" : "%STP_SelectTypeOfRate:TypeOfRate%" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }
